WPEPlatform

API Version: 2.0

Library Version: 2.52.1

Type
Screen
Virtual methods
get_sync_observer invalidate

Generated by gi-docgen 2023.3

Virtual Method

WPEPlatformScreeninvalidate

Declaration [src] 

void
invalidate (
  WPEScreen* screen
)

Description [src]

Invalidate screen. This will release all the platform resources associated with screen. The properties cached will not be modified so they are still available after invalidation.
